# Wroob

> Skills-based internship matching platform connecting ambitious students with innovative companies in India.

Wroob helps students discover internships, build a verified reputation score, and join hyperlocal campus communities. Employers post roles, review skill-matched candidates, and hire trusted interns.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the platform and how it works.
- [About](/about): Mission, team, and what Wroob is building.
- [Internships](/internships): Browse all open internship listings.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on careers, internships, and student life.
- [Help](/help): Frequently asked questions and support.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a student or employer account.
- [Login](/login): Sign in to an existing account.

## Optional

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
